title: Copy Boards with updates and change them without changing the original
excerpt: Is there any way to copy a board so that you always have the latest version of the original board without changing the original board if you have to change or delete something in the copy? It would be an incredible relie…

posts.author: chriseglo (Christian)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there any way to copy a board so that you always have the latest version of the original board without changing the original board if you have to change or delete something in the copy? It would be an incredible relief if I didn’t have to enter data twice all the time because only a limited number of people have access to a board and a lot of people need access to the copy of the original board.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @chriseglo! Can I ask if creating a board template would resolve this for you? This way, you can still maintain the original version (i.e template) but also have the ability to update + build off the template board once it’s been been added to your workspace (without impacting the original template). Let me know if this makes sense!

posts.author: arun.paudyal (Arun Paudyal [Decadis AG])
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Christian (@chriseglo),

Arun here from Decadis AG – monday marketplace partner. We’ve listened closely to the challenges faced by customers like you, and built a solution that’s truly a game-changer. Meet Batch Hero for monday, your superhero for bulk operations and board management.

Batch Hero makes it easy to copy your boards without a hassle. With just a few clicks, you can duplicate your single or multiple boards into any workspace or folder as many times as you need. Your original board remains untouched, so you can create copies for distribution whenever it’s convenient. No more tedious manual copying - Batch Hero streamlines the process for you.

And the best part? The app is still free!

Give it a try and see it for yourself. If you have further questions or would like to discuss your use cases, kindly reach out to us.

Best,
Arun
